POLICY IDENTITY CARD
FIELD VALUE
Policy Name CareShield Plus
Insurer / Company Name Star Health and Allied Insurance Co. Ltd. IRDA Registration Number 129
UIN SHAHLIP24001V012024
Policy Type Individual Health Insurance
Claim Settlement Ratio (2023-24) 91.4%
Network Hospitals 11,000+
Claim Type Cashless at network hospitals; Reimbursement at non-network hospitals
Policy Term 1 year, renewable annually
Available Sum Insured Options Rs 3 Lakh / Rs 5 Lakh / Rs 10 Lakh
Target Income Band Rs 3 Lakh to Rs 15 Lakh per annum
Suitable City Tiers Metro, Tier-2, Tier-3
Suitable Age Range 18 to 65 years
PREMIUM SCHEDULE (ANNUAL, INCLUSIVE OF GST)
All premiums below are for Star Health CareShield Plus policy. Age Band Sum Insured Rs 3 Lakh (Premium/yr)	Sum Insured Rs 5 Lakh (Premium/yr)	Sum Insured Rs 10 Lakh (Premium/yr)
18 to 35 years Rs 5,200 Rs 7,800 Rs 12,400
36 to 45 years Rs 7,600 Rs 11,200 Rs 17,900
46 to 55 years Rs 11,400 Rs 16,800 Rs 26,500
56 to 65 years Rs 16,200 Rs 23,400 Rs 36,800
CO-PAY STRUCTURE
Scenario Co-pay Percentage
Network hospital, Metro city 0% co-pay (no co-pay applicable)
Network hospital, Tier-2 city 0% co-pay (no co-pay applicable)
Network hospital, Tier-3 city 0% co-pay (no co-pay applicable)
Non-network hospital (any city) 5% co-pay on admissible claim amount
Policyholders aged 66 and above 10% co-pay on all claims
CLAIM TYPE
Cashless Claim: Available at all 11,000+ Star Health network hospitals across India.

The policyholder presents
the Star Health insurance card and a valid photo ID at the hospital insurance desk. Pre-authorisation required:
48 hours before planned admission, within 24 hours for emergency admission. Helpline: 1800-425-2255 (24x7). Reimbursement Claim: For non-network hospitals. Submit original bills, discharge summary, diagnostic
reports, and pharmacy receipts within 15 days of discharge. Reimbursement processed within 30 working days
by direct bank transfer. -- 1 of 3 --

SUB-LIMITS
Item Sub-limit
Room Rent (per day) Up to 1% of Sum Insured per day (single private AC room)
ICU / ICCU Charges (per day) Up to 2% of Sum Insured per day
Ambulance Charges Rs 2,000 per hospitalisation event
Cataract Surgery Rs 25,000 per eye per year
AYUSH Treatment Up to 25% of Sum Insured per year
Mental Illness Hospitalisation Rs 50,000 per year (from policy year 2 onwards)
Physiotherapy (post-discharge) Rs 5,000 per year
OPD Consultations and Diagnostics Rs 5,000 per year (Active and Athlete lifestyle only)
Organ Donor Expenses Rs 50,000 per event
INCLUSIONS — WHAT IS COVERED
Covered Item Details
In-patient Hospitalisation Room rent, nursing, surgeon fees, anaesthesia, OT charges, medicines, blood, oxygen, diagn
Day Care Procedures 135 listed procedures not requiring 24-hour admission including cataract, chemotherapy, dialy
Pre-hospitalisation Expenses Medical costs up to 30 days before admission, directly related to admitted condition
Post-hospitalisation Expenses Medical costs up to 60 days after discharge including follow-up, medicines, physiotherapy
OPD Cover Rs 5,000/year for Active or Athlete lifestyle policyholders — covers consultations and diagnos
AYUSH Treatment Ayurveda, Yoga, Unani, Siddha, Homeopathy hospitalisation up to 25% of Sum Insured
Organ Donor Expenses Hospitalisation cost for organ donor up to Rs 50,000
Ambulance Emergency ambulance up to Rs 2,000 per hospitalisation
EXCLUSIONS — WHAT IS NOT COVERED
Excluded Item Details
Pre-existing Conditions — Waiting Period	Diabetes, Hypertension, Cardiac conditions, Asthma, and any declared pre-existing disease a
Cosmetic Surgery Any cosmetic, aesthetic or reconstructive procedure unless caused by accident
Dental Treatment Dental and orthodontic treatment unless hospitalisation needed due to accidental injury
Maternity and Childbirth Not covered under CareShield Plus individual plan
Spectacles and Hearing Aids Spectacles, contact lenses, hearing aids, external prosthetics
Bariatric Surgery Obesity treatment and bariatric surgery not covered
Self-inflicted Injuries Suicide attempts, self-harm, injuries from hazardous sport (motor racing, skydiving, mountain
Experimental Treatment Treatments not approved by the Medical Council of India
STI Treatment Sexually transmitted infections excluded for first 2 years
War and Nuclear Events Claims arising from war, nuclear, biological, or chemical events
WAITING PERIODS
Waiting Period Type Duration Conditions / Notes
Initial Waiting Period 30 days All illnesses.

Accidents are covered from Day 1 with no waiting period. -- 2 of 3 -- Pre-existing Disease (PED) Waiting Period	36 months (3 years) Diabetes, Hypertension, Cardiac conditions, Asthma, and all other declared
Specific Disease Waiting Period24 months (2 years) Hernia, cataract, sinusitis, varicose veins, joint replacement surgery
Mental Illness In-patient 24 months Covered from policy year 3 onwards up to Rs 50,000
SUITABILITY PROFILE
Profile Factor Suitability for CareShield Plus
Age 18–35, no pre-existing conditions HIGHLY SUITABLE — lowest premium band, full coverage from day 31
Age 36–50, income Rs 3L–8L, Tier-2/Tier-3 city	HIGHLY SUITABLE — affordable premiums, strong network coverage
Active or Athlete lifestyle HIGHLY SUITABLE — OPD benefit of Rs 5,000/year included
Pre-existing Diabetes or Hypertension SUITABLE with caution — 36-month waiting period applies; consider HDFC Optima Secu
Income below Rs 3L SUITABLE — most affordable option in portfolio for sum insured Rs 3L
Age above 60, Metro city LESS SUITABLE — room rent sub-limit and 10% co-pay for seniors; consider HDFC Optim
Sedentary lifestyle, no OPD requirementSUITABLE — OPD benefit simply not activated; core cover remains strong -- 3 of 3 --

IRDA Registration Number 146
UIN HDFHLIP24002V012024

Claim Settlement Ratio (2023-24) 98.2%
Network Hospitals 13,000+
Claim Type Cashless at network hospitals; Reimbursement at non-network hospitals
Policy Term 1 year or 2 years (5% discount on 2-year purchase)
Available Sum Insured Options Rs 5 Lakh / Rs 10 Lakh / Rs 15 Lakh
Target Income Band Rs 8 Lakh and above per annum
Suitable City Tiers Metro, Tier-2
Suitable Age Range 18 to 75 years
Restore Benefit 2x Restore — sum insured automatically reinstated 100% once per year if exhausted, for a ne
PREMIUM SCHEDULE (ANNUAL, INCLUSIVE OF GST)
All premiums below are for HDFC ERGO Optima Secure policy.

Age Band Sum Insured Rs 5 Lakh (Premium/yr)	Sum Insured Rs 10 Lakh (Premium/yr)	Sum Insured Rs 15 Lakh (Premium/yr)
18 to 35 years Rs 9,200 Rs 14,800 Rs 21,600
36 to 45 years Rs 13,400 Rs 20,200 Rs 29,800
46 to 55 years Rs 19,800 Rs 30,400 Rs 44,200
56 to 65 years Rs 28,600 Rs 43,800 Rs 62,400
66 to 75 years Rs 41,200 Rs 63,000 Rs 89,800
CO-PAY STRUCTURE
Scenario Co-pay Percentage
Network hospital, Metro city 0% co-pay (no co-pay applicable)
Network hospital, Tier-2 city 0% co-pay (no co-pay applicable)
Non-network hospital (any city) 20% co-pay on admissible claim amount
Policyholder aged 61 and above at entry 10% co-pay on all claims for the first 3 policy years, then 0%
CLAIM TYPE
Cashless Claim: Available at 13,000+ HDFC ERGO network hospitals. Policyholder notifies HDFC ERGO
within 24 hours of emergency or 48 hours before planned admission. Pre-authorisation processed within 2 hours
for emergencies. Helpline: 1800-266-0700 (24x7). Reimbursement Claim: File within 30 days of discharge with original bills, discharge summary, diagnostic
reports, pharmacy invoices, and NEFT details. Settlement within 30 working days by direct NEFT transfer. -- 1 of 3 --

SUB-LIMITS
Item Sub-limit
Room Rent (per day) NO SUB-LIMIT — any room category including suite is fully covered
ICU / ICCU Charges (per day) NO SUB-LIMIT — fully covered
Restore Benefit 100% of original Sum Insured reinstated once per year for a new illness; NOT applicab
Robotic Surgery Rs 1,00,000 per event
Oral Chemotherapy Rs 50,000 per year
Cataract Surgery Rs 40,000 per eye per year
Mental Health In-patient Rs 75,000 per year (covered from policy year 1 with no waiting period)
Mental Health OPD Consultations Rs 800 per consultation, maximum 10 consultations per year
Home Nursing / Physiotherapy Rs 10,000 per hospitalisation event (post-discharge)
International Emergency Cover USD 25,000 per event (Sum Insured Rs 10L and above only)
Preventive Health Check-up Fully covered annually at HDFC ERGO network diagnostic centres
INCLUSIONS — WHAT IS COVERED
Covered Item Details
In-patient Hospitalisation All hospitalisation including room (no sub-limit), nursing, ICU, surgeon, anaesthetist, OT, bloo
Day Care Procedures All procedures in Schedule II including robotic and laparoscopic surgeries
Pre-hospitalisation Expenses 60 days before admission, for costs directly related to admitted condition
Post-hospitalisation Expenses 90 days after discharge including consultations, medicines, physiotherapy
Modern Treatments 12 modern treatments: Oral Chemotherapy, Robotic Surgery, Immunotherapy, Stem Cell The
Mental Health Cover In-patient psychiatric hospitalisation from policy year 1; up to Rs 75,000/year plus 10 OPD co
Restore Benefit (2x) Sum insured reinstated 100% once per year upon exhaustion, for any new illness or injury.

No
Preventive Health Check-up Annual health check-up at HDFC ERGO network diagnostic centres at no extra cost
Home Care Treatment Post-discharge home nursing and physiotherapy up to Rs 10,000 per event
International Emergency Emergency hospitalisation outside India up to USD 25,000 per event (Sum Insured Rs 10L an
AYUSH Treatment Covered under Schedule IV subject to in-patient admission requirement
EXCLUSIONS — WHAT IS NOT COVERED
Excluded Item Details
Pre-existing Conditions — Waiting Period	Diabetes Type 1 and Type 2, Hypertension, Asthma, Cardiac conditions excluded for first 24 m
Cosmetic Surgery Cosmetic, aesthetic, or reconstructive surgery unless required post-accident or post-cancer tr
Dental Treatment Dental and orthodontic unless hospitalisation required due to accidental injury
Bariatric Surgery Obesity treatment, bariatric surgery, and weight management programmes
Addiction Treatment Alcoholism, drug abuse, narcotic addiction-related conditions
Congenital Conditions Internal congenital disease or defects detectable from birth
Infertility IVF, surrogacy, infertility treatment
Alcohol / Narcotics Injury or illness while under influence of alcohol or narcotics
War and Nuclear Events War, terrorism, nuclear, chemical, biological events -- 2 of 3 -- Experimental Treatment Non-allopathic treatments not listed under AYUSH Schedule IV
WAITING PERIODS
Waiting Period Type Duration Conditions / Notes
Initial Waiting Period 30 days All illnesses. Accidents covered from Day 1 with no waiting period.

Pre-existing Disease (PED) Waiting Period	24 months (2 years) Diabetes, Hypertension, Cardiac conditions, Asthma — SHORTEST PED W
Specific Disease Waiting Period24 months (2 years) Cataract, hernia, knee replacement, sinusitis, varicose veins
Mental Health In-patient No waiting period Covered from Day 31 (after initial waiting period only)
Restore Benefit Activation Immediate on exhaustion	Activates the moment sum insured is exhausted; no waiting period for resto
SUITABILITY PROFILE
Profile Factor Suitability for HDFC ERGO Optima Secure
Income Rs 8L and above, Metro or Tier-2 city	HIGHLY SUITABLE — premium justified by no room rent sub-limit and 98.2% claim settle
Pre-existing Diabetes or Hypertension HIGHLY SUITABLE — shortest PED waiting period (24 months) vs 36 months on compet
Age 30–55, comprehensive coverage needed	HIGHLY SUITABLE — restore benefit provides double effective cover
Cardiac condition declared HIGHLY SUITABLE — 24-month waiting period then fully covered; no exclusion after wait
Income below Rs 8L LESS SUITABLE — premium pricing is higher; Star Health CareShield Plus may be more
Tier-3 city resident LESS SUITABLE — network coverage stronger in Metro and Tier-2; consider Star Health
Active or Athlete lifestyle needing OPD PARTIALLY SUITABLE — no OPD benefit; mental health OPD included but general OPD
Age 66 to 75 SUITABLE with 10% co-pay for first 3 years — only plan in portfolio covering above age 6 -- 3 of 3 --

POLICY IDENTITY CARD
FIELD VALUE
Policy Name ReAssure 2.0
Insurer / Company Name Niva Bupa Health Insurance Company Limited
IRDA Registration Number 145
UIN NIVHLIP24003V012024
Policy Type Individual Health Insurance — Value Segment
Claim Settlement Ratio (2023-24) 94.2%
Network Hospitals 10,000+
Claim Type Cashless at network hospitals; Reimbursement at non-network hospitals
Policy Term 1 year, renewable annually
Available Sum Insured Options Rs 3 Lakh / Rs 5 Lakh / Rs 7 Lakh
Target Income Band Under Rs 3 Lakh to Rs 8 Lakh per annum
Suitable City Tiers Metro, Tier-2, Tier-3
Suitable Age Range 18 to 75 years
Lock-in Benefit No loading on premiums post-claim — premium stays same regardless of claims made
PREMIUM SCHEDULE (ANNUAL, INCLUSIVE OF GST)
All premiums below are for Niva Bupa ReAssure 2.0 policy.

Age Band Sum Insured Rs 3 Lakh (Premium/yr)	Sum Insured Rs 5 Lakh (Premium/yr)	Sum Insured Rs 7 Lakh (Premium/yr)
18 to 35 years Rs 3,800 Rs 5,600 Rs 7,200
36 to 45 years Rs 5,400 Rs 8,200 Rs 10,800
46 to 55 years Rs 8,600 Rs 13,200 Rs 17,400
56 to 65 years Rs 13,200 Rs 20,400 Rs 26,800
66 to 75 years Rs 19,800 Rs 30,600 Rs 40,200
CO-PAY STRUCTURE
Scenario Co-pay Percentage
Network hospital, Metro city 0% co-pay (no co-pay applicable)
Network hospital, Tier-2 city 0% co-pay (no co-pay applicable)
Network hospital, Tier-3 city 0% co-pay (no co-pay applicable)
Non-network hospital (any city) 10% co-pay on admissible claim amount
Policyholders aged 61 to 75 at entry 20% co-pay on all claims for lifetime of policy
CLAIM TYPE
Cashless Claim: Available at 10,000+ Niva Bupa network hospitals. Intimate Niva Bupa within 24 hours of
emergency or 48 hours before planned admission. Cashless authorisation issued within 4 hours. Helpline:
1800-208-8877 (24x7). Reimbursement Claim: Submit within 20 days of discharge with originals of all bills, discharge summary, and
diagnostic reports. Settlement within 21 working days — fastest in the segment. -- 1 of 3 --

SUB-LIMITS
Item Sub-limit
Room Rent (per day) Up to 2% of Sum Insured per day — higher than most plans in value segment
ICU / ICCU Charges (per day) Up to 4% of Sum Insured per day
Ambulance Charges Rs 3,000 per hospitalisation event
Cataract Surgery Rs 20,000 per eye per year
AYUSH Treatment Up to 20% of Sum Insured per year
Mental Illness Hospitalisation Rs 30,000 per year (from policy year 1)
Domiciliary Treatment Up to Rs 20,000 per year for treatment at home on doctor's advice
OPD Consultations (all lifestyle types) Rs 3,000 per year — available to all policyholders regardless of lifestyle
Premium Loading Post-Claim ZERO — premium not increased after a claim is made (Lock-in Benefit)
INCLUSIONS — WHAT IS COVERED
Covered Item Details
In-patient Hospitalisation Room rent (up to 2% SI/day), nursing, surgeon, anaesthesia, OT, medicines, blood, oxygen, d
Day Care Procedures Listed 141 day-care procedures including dialysis, chemotherapy, cataract, lithotripsy
Pre-hospitalisation Expenses 30 days before admission for related costs
Post-hospitalisation Expenses 60 days after discharge including medicines, follow-up, physiotherapy
OPD Cover Rs 3,000/year for all policyholders — no lifestyle restriction; covers consultations and pharma
Domiciliary Treatment Home treatment up to Rs 20,000/year where hospitalisation not possible or not advised
AYUSH Treatment In-patient treatment under Ayurveda, Unani, Siddha, Homeopathy up to 20% of Sum Insured
Mental Health In-patient Rs 30,000/year from policy year 1 — no additional waiting period
Lock-in Benefit No loading on renewal premium after a claim — unique feature of ReAssure 2.0
Ambulance Rs 3,000 per hospitalisation for emergency road ambulance
EXCLUSIONS — WHAT IS NOT COVERED
Excluded Item Details
Pre-existing Conditions — Waiting Period	Diabetes, Hypertension, Asthma, Cardiac conditions excluded for first 36 months (3 years).

F
Cosmetic Surgery All cosmetic and aesthetic procedures not related to accident or illness treatment
Dental Treatment Dental and orthodontic treatment unless accident-related
Maternity Not covered under individual plan
Bariatric Surgery Weight management and bariatric procedures
Hazardous Activities Injuries from motor racing, skydiving, mountaineering above 5,500 m
War and Nuclear Events War, civil unrest, nuclear, chemical, biological events
Experimental Treatment Treatments not approved by the Medical Council of India
Infertility IVF and assisted reproduction not covered
WAITING PERIODS -- 2 of 3 -- Waiting Period Type Duration Conditions / Notes
Initial Waiting Period 30 days All illnesses. Accidents covered from Day 1. Pre-existing Disease (PED) Waiting Period	36 months (3 years) Diabetes, Hypertension, Cardiac, Asthma.

Special rule: policyholders aged
Specific Disease Waiting Period24 months (2 years) Cataract, hernia, sinusitis, varicose veins, joint replacement

SUITABILITY PROFILE
Profile Factor Suitability for Niva Bupa ReAssure 2.0
Income under Rs 3L — any city tier HIGHLY SUITABLE — lowest premium in portfolio; Rs 3,800/year for age 18–35
Income Rs 3L to Rs 8L, Tier-3 city HIGHLY SUITABLE — strong Tier-3 network and low premium
Frequent claimers, chronic conditions HIGHLY SUITABLE — Lock-in Benefit means premium never increases post-claim
Age 56 to 75 with pre-existing conditionsSUITABLE — PED waiver possible for age 55+ with loading; only plan offering this
All lifestyle types needing OPD SUITABLE — OPD Rs 3,000/year available to ALL policyholders unlike other plans
Income above Rs 8L, Metro city LESS SUITABLE — sum insured capped at Rs 7L; consider HDFC Optima Secure
Those needing Rs 10L+ coverage NOT SUITABLE — maximum sum insured is Rs 7 Lakh
Pre-existing Diabetes, need shortest wait	LESS SUITABLE — 36-month PED waiting; consider HDFC Optima Secure (24 months) -- 3 of 3 --
